title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's Growth Team used Claude Code to achieve rapid scaling from $1 billion to $19 billion in 14 months. He identifies four key strategies: automating existing workflows, enabling sub-threshold work now worth doing, building unique tools, and using AI as a thought partner. The video argues that most people fail to realize full AI leverage by treating it as additional work rather than a multiplier.
